channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:
1. Mina The Hollower Has A 'Bad' Ending, But It's Super Tough To Get  Kotaku
  2. Mina the Hollower review – squeaky fresh fun full of vintage magic  The Guardian
  3. Indie Video Game ‘Mina the Hollower’ Sells 300,000 Copies in Three Days  Bloomberg
  4. "I don't think we can ask people to pay $30 for a pixel art game" - As Mina the Hollower passes 300,000 copies sold, Yacht Club Games says studio will be "fine" following acclaimed 'make-or-break' release  Eurogamer
  5. I Love Turning On Every Modifier In Mina The Hollower  Kotaku

item.title: Intel Arc G3 Extreme Performance Benchmarks Show Clear Disruption In The Handled Segment, Offers Double The Battery At Same Performance As Z2 Extreme - Wccftech
item.description:
1. Intel Arc G3 Extreme Performance Benchmarks Show Clear Disruption In The Handled Segment, Offers Double The Battery At Same Performance As Z2 Extreme  Wccftech
  2. I held the next-gen handheld  The Verge
  3. The Intel Arc G3 Series Inside Story: How Intel Created a Purpose-built Gaming Handheld Silicon That Isn't a Hamstrung U-Segment Chip  TechPowerUp
  4. OneXPlayer 3 is a new Intel Arc G3 Extreme handheld gaming PC  PCWorld
  5. The new Intel Arc G3-powered MSI Claw 8 EX AI+ makes my Steam Deck look like a Happy Meal toy by comparison — it’s time for an upgrade  TechRadar
